violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and "f'real" machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the cold hold drawers and walk-in cooler vents have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The floors under the retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine vents have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
Refuse area was observed with leaf litter on ground. Area to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The floors and fanguards in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of dust and residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
Refuse area was observed with leaf litter and trash on the ground. Area for refuse, returnables or recyclables must be maintained clean and free of litter. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
